## Summary
Removes stale merged-PR body artifact `.github/pr-bodies/PR-651.md` from `main` so canon/token audits are not polluted by historical governance metadata.

## Scope
- Removes `.github/pr-bodies/PR-651.md` only.
- No runtime code.
- No tests changed.
- No config changed.
- No pipeline, scoring, lease, registry, Wave, SQL, or app behavior changed.

## Validation
- Diff should show exactly one deleted file: `.github/pr-bodies/PR-651.md`.
- Post-merge grep audit should confirm the locked I:44 tokens no longer surface from `.github/pr-bodies/**`.

## Risks & Anomalies
Low. This removes stale audit metadata for a merged PR.

No-Pipeline-Impact: true
